name: autobiography-of-a-yogi
description: Paramahansa Yogananda's 'Autobiography of a Yogi: The Original 1946 Edition plus Bonus Material' — the spiritual classic that introduced millions of Westerners to yoga and meditation, chronicling Yogananda's life, his search for his guru Sri Yukteswar, and the science of Kriya Yoga for self-realization.
useCase: Understand the foundational text of modern yoga in the West, the guru-disciple relationship, the science of Kriya Yoga meditation, and the unity behind the world's spiritual traditions.
knownRisks: Contains accounts of supernatural phenomena that may challenge skeptical readers
Some historical claims are disputed by scholars
The 1946 edition reflects a pre-modern worldview
